title: paspalum setaceum var. ciliatifolium
intro: Paspalum setaceum var. ciliatifolium, also known as the Red Fountain Grass, is a type of tropical grass native to the island of Mauritius. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and promote overall health and well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Red Fountain Grass are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin problems.
